+ /**
+  * Localized Link component
+  */
+ interface LinkProps extends ComponentProps<typeof NextLink> {
+ 	locale?: Locale;
+ }
+ 
+ export function Link({ href, locale, ...props }: LinkProps) {
+ 	const localizedHref = locale 
+ 		? createLocalizedPath(href.toString(), locale)
+ 		: href;
+ 		
+ 	return <NextLink href={localizedHref} {...props} />;
+ }
+ 
+ /**
+  * Hook to get current pathname
+  */
+ export function usePathname() {
+ 	return useNextPathname();

+                 <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="min-w-[140px]">
+                   {languages.map((language) => (
+                     <DropdownMenuItem key={language.code} asChild>
                        <Link
-                         key={language.code}
                          href={pathname}
                          locale={language.code}
-                         onClick={() => setIsLanguageMenuOpen(false)}
                          className={clsx(
-                           "inline-flex items-center gap-3 px-6 py-3 border-2 bg-background/80 text-foreground rounded-xl font-semibold backdrop-blur-[20px] border-border/40 shadow-[0_1px_3px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05),0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:bg-muted/80 hover:border-border/60 hover:translate-y-[-2px] hover:shadow-[0_2px_6px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08),0_4px_16px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06)] transition-all duration-200 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)] font-semibold tracking-[-0.01em] !px-3 !py-2 relative overflow-hidden block px-4 py-2 text-sm text-foreground hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors",
-                           locale === language.code &&
-                           "bg-primary/10 text-primary font-medium",
+                           "flex w-full items-center justify-between cursor-pointer",
+                           locale === language.code && "bg-accent font-medium"
                          )}
                        >
-                         <span className="font-medium">
-                           {language.nativeName}
-                         </span>
-                         <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-auto">
+                         <span>{language.nativeName}</span>
+                         <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                            {language.name}
                          </span>
                        </Link>
-                     ))}
-                   </div>
-                 )}
-               </div>
+                     </DropdownMenuItem>
+                   ))}
+                 </DropdownMenuContent>
+               </DropdownMenu>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
- 
-       {/* Overlay to close language menu */}
-       {isLanguageMenuOpen && (
-         <div
-           className="fixed inset-0 z-40"
-           onClick={() => setIsLanguageMenuOpen(false)}
-         />
-       )}
      </header>
    );

Thank you for providing this comprehensive summary of the work completed on your minimal-cv project! It looks like you've successfully accomplished both of your main objectives:

## ✅ **Configuration Setup Complete**
- **Prettier** configured with Tailwind plugin for consistent code formatting
